calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar Apr-30-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lavonne Thayer in Propria Persona.
Jaimie Mortinson also present.

The Parties indicated that there is no official record of death. The Court granted the Petition to Establish Fact of Death (subject to review of the order). Ms. Thayer provided a proposed order.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar Apr-08-2019 Continued To Apr-22-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
